details.test: Task 1: Buy cheapest qualifying 12-panel rail-based kit
Task 2: Select commercial flat-roof ballasted system under 30000
Task 3: Configure 24-panel shingle system and add BOM to cart
Task 4: Add three wire management accessories under 15
Task 5: Access installation manual and Florida engineering letter
Task 6: Register for installer training webinar after 2025-06-01
Task 7: Submit technical support request for rail misalignment on tile roof
Task 8: Find nearest stocking distributor within 100 miles of Denver
Task 9: Compare rail profiles and buy lighter one under 40 per rail
